mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO travel_note_chunks (note_id, chunk_text, chunk_index, embedding, location_keywords, content_type, created_at) VALUES
( #{chunk.noteId}, #{chunk.chunkText}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.embedding}::vector, #{chunk.locationKeywordsStr}, #{chunk.contentType}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO travel_note_chunks (note_id, chunk_text, chunk_index, embedding, location_keywords, content_type, created_at) VALUES ( #{chunk.noteId}, #{chunk.chunkText}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.embedding}::vector, #{chunk.locationKeywordsStr}, #{chunk.contentType}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT tnc.id, tnc.note_id, tnc.chunk_text, tnc.chunk_index, tnc.location_keywords AS locationKeywordsStr, tnc.content_type AS contentType, tnc.created_at, tn.title AS note_title FROM travel_note_chunks tnc JOIN user_travel_notes tn ON tnc.note_id = tn.id WHERE tn.status = 'active' AND tnc.location_keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationKeyword}, '%') ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT tnc.id, tnc.note_id, tnc.chunk_text, tnc.chunk_index, tnc.content_type AS contentType, tnc.created_at, tn.title AS note_title FROM travel_note_chunks tnc JOIN user_travel_notes tn ON tnc.note_id = tn.id WHERE tn.status = 'active' AND tnc.content_type = #{contentType} AND tnc.location_keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationKeyword}, '%') ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
